title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Transformation Lens: Refactor Equivalence
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp refactor equivalence increment in a production-shaped functional service and decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Demonstrate behavior preservation with characterization tests and changed-case comparisons.
Compose ingestion, validation, transformation, aggregation, and emission with bounded resource use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
